programme.title: My Cat From Hell

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins
programme.desc: It's A Baby Giraffe! There's huge excitement at Australia Zoo: Rosie the Giraffe is set to give birth! Robert has a bloody encounter with a wild python that entered an enclosure.

programme.title: Lone Star Law
programme.desc: Dog. Texas Game Wardens must relocate a 500-lb gator roaming a suburban area. Plus, they uncover a large marijuana grow hidden in a wildlife preserve.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees

programme.title: My Cat From Hell
programme.desc: George and Beth are prisoners in their own home due to their vicious kitty Reese. Reese is a cat version of Jack the Ripper and Beth is one of his choice targets.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell
programme.desc: Alan and Shannon wanted a cat to cuddle, but instead they got Barnabas - a hissing, flesh ripping cat. The only thing that calms him down is opera music.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters

programme.title: Meet The Orangutans
programme.desc: Chiquita was only two months old when she arrived at Sepilok sanctuary. Now three years old, her surrogate attachment to one of the staff is causing developmental issues.

programme.title: Meet The Orangutans

programme.title: How Do Animals Do That?
programme.desc: Which birds can fly as high as a passenger jet? Why are tiny jumping spiders dancing for their lives? How have West Coast squirrels outsmarted rattlesnakes.

programme.title: How Do Animals Do That?
programme.desc: The Secret To A Long Life. How are homing pigeons able to find their way home? How are spiders luring bugs into their trap? How can some fish survive for years above ground.

programme.title: Little Giants

programme.title: Little Giants

programme.title: Edge of Alaska
programme.desc: The hidden city inside the mountain is within reach, but exploration means convincing locals for help. It's 40 below and the trailblazing ranchers are in danger.

programme.desc: World famous Long Island Medium Theresa Caputo has asked Wayde and Brett to build her two aquariums - a mermaid tank and a koi pond.

programme.title: Tanked

programme.desc: The number of crocodiles in Australia has boomed - and they're getting bigger and more deadly. An investigation into murderous crocs and the life-saving attempts to relocate them.

programme.title: How Do Animals Do That?
programme.desc: How does a fish make a weapon out of water? Why do turtles always return to the same beach to lay their eggs? Why do rhinos all poop in the same place.

programme.title: How Do Animals Do That?
programme.desc: How do caterpillars transform into butterflies in their cocoon? Plus, why are cats' tongues the way they are? Experts answer these questions and more.

programme.desc: Dr. Dee and Ken head to Eagle, Alaska, to host a vet clinic; dog that suffered a vicious attack needs emergency surgery; Dr. Dee contemplates a lovesick turtle mystery; checking a rancher's cows for pregnancy.

programme.desc: Dr. Dee flies to a remote clinic in Healy; tumors found on dog getting spayed; Dr. Dee readies Nugget the Bull to breed; Dr. Terry is surprised while giving six kittens their shots.

programme.title: The Zoo
programme.desc: The TAB staff heads to Manhattan to rescue a wallaby living in an apartment; a fruit bat discovers how to spread her wings, and a trio of alligators move into their summer home.

programme.title: The Zoo

programme.title: Louisiana Law

programme.title: Louisiana Law

programme.title: Louisiana Law
programme.desc: When a pair of illegal hunters flee by truck, wildlife agents set out to track them down; heaps of trash dumped at a fishing spot lead to a suspect who denies any wrongdoing; damning evidence in a truck bed catches a hunter in a lie.

programme.title: Louisiana Law
programme.desc: A suspicious man fleeing on the levee after dark puts wildlife agents in danger; a first-time bowhunter could lose his kill over a major violation; agents question a duck hunter with an attitude who seems to be hiding something.

programme.title: Louisiana Law
programme.desc: A suspicious driver leads wildlife agents on a high-speed chase through a national forest; goose-hunting guides are caught in a repeat offense; a routine stop turns treacherous when a suspect is discovered concealing a firearm.

programme.title: Louisiana Law
programme.desc: A bizarre discovery inside an abandoned cooler escalates a littering probe. Wildlife agents patrolling in dense fog are thrown into a dangerous encounter, and a burglary investigation uncovers an illegally taken deer.

programme.title: Yellowstone Wardens
